statusLine.command: bash -c 'cols=$(stty size </dev/tty 2>/dev/null | awk '"'"'{print $2}'"'"'); export COLUMNS=$(( ${cols:-120} > 4 ? ${cols:-120} - 4 : 1 )); plugin_dir=$(ls -d "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"/plugins/cache/*/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | sed '"'"'s|//*$|/|'"'"' | awk -F/ '"'"'{ print $(NF-1) "\t" $(0) }'"'"' | grep -E '"'"'^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+[[:space:]]'"'"' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n -k4,4n | tail -1 | cut -f2-); exec "/opt/homebrew/bin/bun" --env-file /dev/null "${plugin_dir}src/index.ts" --extra-cmd "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.config/claude}/plugins/context-mode/statusline-label.sh"'
